frase_completa: Não viajamos pra escapar da vida, mas pra que a vida não nos escape.
caption:
Não viajamos pra escapar da vida.

A gente viaja pra que a vida não escape da gente.

Qual viagem te fez sentir isso? 👇

#PPTravelInfinite #ViajarÉPreciso #ExperienciasQueValem #DicasDeViagem
video_prompt: A 6-second cinematic vertical 9:16 video. A person in their 60s seen from behind, sitting on a low weathered stone ledge at the edge of a vast open landscape — rolling golden grasslands stretching to the horizon, no specific landmark recognizable. The figure is small, leaning slightly forward with elbows on knees, fully absorbed in watching the world spread out before them. The sky fills the upper two thirds of the frame: dramatic slow-moving cumulus clouds lit from below by warm late-afternoon light, amber and deep gold at the horizon fading to steel blue above. Camera: very slow continuous push-in toward the horizon, smooth and steady, no jumps or cuts. Lighting: late golden hour, the sun just below the horizon line, casting a warm diffused amber glow across the plain and catching the edges of the clouds. Mood: philosophical, contemplative, presence over escape — 'life is happening and I am here for it'. Color palette: deep warm amber horizon, slate-blue and charcoal clouds, muted golden grassland, earth tones. No on-screen text. No logos. No recognizable face. Face completely out of frame. Editorial cinema quality, 35mm shallow depth of field equivalent. 1080x1920, 30fps.
